candidates.why: Appears directly under the selected COGS total lines and alongside other COGS components such as 'Other Cost of goods and services sold', indicating it is a sub-component embedded within the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level operating expense to add later.

candidates.why: Appears beneath 'Administration expenses' with other administrative sub-components, so it looks embedded in the selected XSGA bucket (Sales and marketing expenses + Administration expenses) rather than a separate same-level line to add later.
The row is blank in the excerpt and is not clearly presented as a separate operating SG&A amortisation line that should be added outside the selected SG&A components.
